creator: bsd@dino.sk
text:
Created attachment 237292
mail/claws-mail: patch to add GTK2/GTK3 options

Claws Mail team released GTK3 versin for some time along with older GTK2. Development focus slowly shifts to GTK3, but FreeBSD port does not reflect this. Patch presented add radio buttons for GTK2/GTK3 selection while keeping GTK2 as default for now.

Makefile is being portclippy'ed and portfmt'ed.

All Claws Mail plugin ports reflect the choice made by master port properly.
